author: Mike.e.2002
title: Cloudverbindung
content: Entgegen den Hinweisen bei der Upgradeversion werden nicht alle Cloudverbindingen von Evermusic hier unterstützt. Es fehlt HiDrive. Warum?

author: O2 fröhliche
title: App is just crashing all the time
content: Hi there, currently this App is not doing what it is supposed to do. It’s crashing all the time. I couldn’t even write you a feedback mail out of the app.  In addition to smb will there be a remote MyCloud Home support in the future like in the flacbox app?
